name: Network Diagnostics (Parameterized)
description: Runs a comprehensive network diagnostic suite using PowerShell: adapter info, IP configuration, DNS resolution, ping tests, and port connectivity checks. Supports parameterized target host and port.
author: sentinel-desktop

parameters.name: target_host
parameters.label: Target Host
parameters.description: Hostname or IP address to test connectivity against (e.g., google.com, 8.8.8.8, or an internal server)

parameters.name: dns_server
parameters.label: DNS Server
parameters.description: Optional: DNS server to query for resolution tests. Default uses system-configured DNS.

parameters.name: test_port
parameters.label: Port to Test
parameters.description: TCP port number to test connectivity on (e.g., 443 for HTTPS, 3389 for RDP). Set to 0 to skip port test.

parameters.name: ping_count
parameters.label: Ping Count
parameters.description: Number of ICMP ping packets to send to the target host

params.text: Write-Host '===== Sentinel Desktop — Network Diagnostics =====' -ForegroundColor Cyan
Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq 'Up' } | Format-Table Name, InterfaceDescription, Status, LinkSpeed -AutoSize
Get-NetIPConfiguration | Where-Object { $_.IPv4DefaultGateway } | Format-List InterfaceAlias, IPv4Address, IPv4DefaultGateway, DNSServer

steps.description: Show IP configuration for adapters with default gateways
steps.name: Show IP configuration for adapters with default ga

params.text: Write-Host "[3/6] DNS Resolution Test for {{target_host}}:" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Resolve-DnsName -Name '{{target_host}}' -Server {{dns_server}} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, IPAddress, NameHost -AutoSize

steps.description: DNS lookup of the target host against specified DNS server
steps.name: DNS lookup of the target host against specified DN

params.text: Write-Host "[4/6] Ping Test — {{ping_count}} packets to {{target_host}}:" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Test-Connection -ComputerName '{{target_host}}' -Count {{ping_count}} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Address, ResponseTime, StatusCode -AutoSize

steps.description: Send ICMP ping packets to the target host
steps.name: Send ICMP ping packets to the target host

params.text: Write-Host "[5/6] Default Gateway Ping Test:" -ForegroundColor Yellow

$gateway = (Get-NetRoute -DestinationPrefix '0.0.0.0/0' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1).NextHop; if ($gateway) { Test-Connection -ComputerName $gateway -Count 2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Address, ResponseTime -AutoSize } else { Write-Host 'No default gateway found.' -ForegroundColor Red }

steps.description: Ping the default gateway to test local network connectivity
steps.name: Ping the default gateway to test local network con

params.text: Write-Host "[6/6] TCP Port {{test_port}} Test on {{target_host}}:" -ForegroundColor Yellow

$tcpResult = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName '{{target_host}}' -Port {{test_port}} -WarningAction SilentlyContinue -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Remote Address: $($tcpResult.RemoteAddress) | Remote Port: $($tcpResult.RemotePort) | TCP Succeeded: $($tcpResult.TcpTestSucceeded)" -ForegroundColor $(if ($tcpResult.TcpTestSucceeded) { 'Green' } else { 'Red' })

steps.description: Test TCP connectivity to the specified port on the target host
steps.name: Test TCP connectivity to the specified port on the
